name: Kato Samuel
title: Full Stack & Mobile Developer
bio: I'm a passionate full-stack and mobile developer with hands-on experience building production-grade web and mobile applications. I specialise in architecting scalable systems, designing clean APIs, and delivering complete end-to-end solutions across web and mobile platforms.
bio2: With a strong foundation in both frontend and backend engineering, I bring ideas from concept to deployed product — handling everything from database design to CI/CD pipelines and server configuration.
